name: gmc
description: Steam market analytics from Game Market Copilot: MCP tools plus the gmc-analysis skill for cohort analysis, market sizing, and branded chart cards.

interface.shortDescription: Steam market analytics: observed data, cohort analysis, chart cards
interface.longDescription: Query Game Market Copilot's Steam market database from Codex: size cohorts with population-true aggregates, check research coverage before fan-outs, pull per-title profiles and review evidence, and turn results into publish-ready branded chart cards. Data is observed on a regular collection schedule, not estimated. Requires a paid GMC plan (Starter or Pro).
defaultPrompt: How many Steam titles released in 2025 sit in the $10-15 price band?
Compare roguelike releases by review-count bucket over the last two years
Make a branded chart card of release counts by price band for 2025
